Docs.summary: A class representing a PolicySetDefinition along with the instance operations that can be performed on it. If you have a you can construct a from an instance of using the GetResource method. Otherwise you can get one from its parent resource using the GetPolicySetDefinitions method.

Docs.summary:
This operation deletes the policy set definition in the given subscription with the given name.
Request Path. /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policySetDefinitions/{policySetDefinitionName}.
Operation Id. PolicySetDefinitions_Delete.
Default Api Version. 2025-12-01-preview.

Docs.param: The policy set definition version. The format is x.y.z where x is the major version number, y is the minor version number, and z is the patch number.

The cancellation token to use.
Docs.summary: This operation retrieves the policy set definition version in the given subscription with the given name and version.
Docs.exception: is an empty string, and was expected to be non-empty.
